text: A woman with long dark hair and wearing a black turtleneck holds up a red scarf with fringes, preparing to demonstrate how to wear it.
The woman begins by placing the scarf around her neck and proceeds to adjust it using both hands, demonstrating the 'side pull through' method.
A woman with long black hair and a black turtleneck is shown holding a red scarf above her head. She begins to wrap the scarf around her neck.
The woman continues to adjust the scarf, pulling it through her hands and positioning it neatly around her neck.
She ties the ends of the scarf into a knot at the front, ensuring it sits comfortably against her chest.
With both hands, she smooths out the scarf, making final adjustments to ensure it looks tidy and stylish.
A woman is holding a red scarf up in front of her face, then she brings it down and wraps it around her neck in a croissant style.
The woman begins by lifting the scarf above her head. Then she places the scarf around her neck, crossing the ends in front of her chest.
She adjusts the scarf, pulling it tight and ensuring it sits neatly around her neck and smoothing it down with her hands.
